description: Reporting-rate stats across the parsed AI/ML corpus (optionally by panel). Each rate is a presence figure with its denominator — 'reported in X of Y audited devices' — never a pooled performance value. Excludes not-yet-parsed devices from every denominator and discloses the parse queue separately. P

description.name: device_postmarket_lookup
description.description: Post-clearance intelligence for one AI/ML device by 510(k) number: its product code's recalls, MAUDE adverse-event level and trend, warning-letter and 483 matches for the applicant, plus per-device drift signals (adverse-event inflection, re-clearances of the same device line, software-recall patter

description.name: postmarket_search
description.description: Find AI/ML devices by postmarket criteria — product code, panel, applicant, whether any drift signal exists, minimum recalls in 24 months, or a rising MAUDE trend. Returns per-device postmarket summaries with drift-signal counts.

description.name: cohort_postmarket_stats
description.description: Postmarket presence rates across the snapshotted AI/ML device cohort (optionally by panel): share with any recall in 24 months, with a rising MAUDE trend, with any drift signal, with a warning-letter match — every rate with its denominator inline, never pooled across devices.

description.name: reimbursement_lookup
description.description: Trace the clearance-to-payment pathway for an AI/ML device by FDA clearance number (K/DEN, e.g. DEN170073) OR bare CPT code (e.g. 75580). Returns every payment mechanism (NTAP add-on, Category I/III CPT + CMS rate, HCPCS, MAC LCD) with amounts, effective dates, and source links, plus any commercial/

description.name: reimbursement_search
description.description: Find AI/ML device payment pathways by mechanism — e.g. 'devices that got NTAP', 'devices paid under a Category I CPT code', 'pathways with a known CMS dollar rate'. Filters: mechanism, CPT category, NTAP status, applicant. Returns pathways with amounts, effective dates, and sources. Use reimbursemen

description.name: reimbursement_stats
description.description: Distribution of payment mechanisms across the AI/ML reimbursement corpus — pathway and distinct-device counts per mechanism (NTAP, Cat I, Cat III/APC, …) with the min/median/max dollar amounts for each. Deliberately never a single pooled 'reimbursement rate': NTAP add-on amounts and CMS rates are di

description.name: vehicle_risk_lookup
description.description: Look up NHTSA safety history for a vehicle by make, model, and model year. Returns recall campaigns and complaint statistics (crashes, fires, injuries, top components).

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "device_postmarket_lookup" stacks urgency/override words (never, warning). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
